what: Thermodynamic / kinetic-proofreading curve of the triage (additive measurement)
lens: Hopfield-Ninio kinetic proofreading; Landauer bound; Thermodynamic Uncertainty Relation

reading.kinetic_proofreading: each estimator is a proofreading step buying route-information with compute
reading.early_exit: cheap steps carry most bits/second -> the Unified Core early-exit ordering is the thermodynamically efficient order, now grounded empirically
reading.medium_is_optimal_abstention: when the full chain still leaves residual route-uncertainty, paying more dissipation is wasted -> MEDIUM is the optimal stop

caveats: Information is measured exactly (bits, Miller-Madow). Cost is representative per-estimator wall-clock on a dev M4 (threshold_calibration.json / scale_ceiling.json), not per-circuit timed.
Landauer/TUR are the conceptual lens; we quantify bits and compute-cost, not Joules.
Single-estimator-only route classes exist on the 800-row stratified set.
